title: build the swagger.yml on readthedocs
body:
One problem with the swagger upload is we need an extra bucket and then
we need our own custom version schema and selector on the website. If we
can just embed the swagger.yml as part of the official build we can get
rid of all of that and have a much simpler way as the regular
readthedocs version selector will work.

We also no longer need to maintain an extra bucket upload and no longer
need to update the version list which was forgotten all the time.

Fixes: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/podman/issues/28827


#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.
-->

```release-note
The API documentation on docs.podman.io now only contains the current version for the one selected with the read the docs selector.
```

comments.body:
And to confirm I did verify this works on readthedocs, I added my fork as project to get build you can see the result here https://luap99-podman-test.readthedocs.io/en/latest/Reference.html
and the build log which should the swagger being build https://app.readthedocs.org/projects/luap99-podman-test/builds/33275029/
